nodes.name: 花脸鸭
nodes.summary: 花脸鸭（Baikal teal，学名 Sibirionetta formosa），分类上属于雁形目，并归入鸭科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括猎捕压力。

links.evidence: formosa }} thumb|Baikal teal The Baikal teal (Sibirionetta formosa), also called the bimaculate duck or squawk duck, is a dabbling duck that breeds in eastern Russia and winters in East Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is a migratory species, wintering in South Korea, Japan, Taiwan, northern and eastern China, from Beijing down the coast to the Vietnam border, and west to Yunnan then north to Chongqing and Henan. It breeds in pools on the tundra edge and within swampy forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species is classified as Least Concern on the IUCN Red List, though it was classified as Vulnerable before 2011 due to hunting and destruction of its wintering wetland habitats. These threats remain, but the Baikal teal is recovering, with increased numbers of wintering birds and some increase in habitat area
